sibling.name: Geldolf van BRUGGE en van GRUUTHUSE

zh.lifeSummary: Guidolphe de Bruges Chevalier是Richwara of Zülpichgau的兒子，於大約1246年出生在艾歐洛。他於1265年之前與Gertrude d'Assche在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guidolphe de Bruges Chevalier是Richwara of Zülpichgau的儿子，于大约1246年出生在艾歐洛。他于1265年之前与Gertrude d'Assche在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bruges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Burgess  .

variants.name: Burgess
meanings: English: status name from Middle English burge(i)s, burgis, borgeis ‘inhabitant of a borough’ (strictly one possessing full municipal rights), ‘freeman of a borough’. Burgesses generally had tenure of land or buildings from a landlord by burgage. In medieval England burgage involved the payment of a fixed money rent (as opposed to payment in kind); in Scotland it involved payment in service, guarding the town. The -eis ending is from Latin -ensis (modern English -ese as in Portuguese). Compare Burger .
History: Thomas Burgess came from England to MA c. 1630 and eventually settled in Sandwich, MA.

en.lifeSummary: Guidolphe de Bruges Chevalier was born about 1246, in Europe as the son of Richwara of Zülpichgau. He married Gertrude d'Assche before 1265, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Guidolphe de Bruges Chevalier est né environ 1246, à Europe, fils de Richwara of Zülpichgau. Il a épousé Gertrude d'Assche avant 1265, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Guidolphe de Bruges Chevalier wurde um 1246 in Europa, als Sohn von Richwara of Zülpichgau geboren. Er hat vor 1265 in Europa Gertrude d'Assche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Guidolphe de Bruges Chevalier è nato il circa 1246 nel Europa come figlio di Richwara of Zülpichgau. Lui sposato Gertrude d'Assche prima del 1265, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Guidolphe de Bruges Chevalierは約1246年にヨーロッパでRichwara of Zülpichgauの息子として生まれた。1265年以前にヨーロッパでGertrude d'Asscheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Guidolphe de Bruges Chevalier(은)는 대략 1246년 우럽에서 Richwara of Zülpichgau의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1265년 이전 우럽에서 Gertrude d'Assche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guidolphe de Bruges Chevalier nasceu aproximadamente 1246, em Europa filho de Richwara of Zülpichgau. Ele casou-se com Gertrude d'Assche antes 1265, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Guidolphe de Bruges Chevalier родился около 1246 г. в местности Европа. Его мать звали Richwara of Zülpichgau. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrude d'Assche перед 1265 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Guidolphe de Bruges Chevalier nació aproximadamente 1246, en Europa como hijo de Richwara of Zülpichgau. Se casó con Gertrude d'Assche antes de 1265, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
